name: Raspberry Cranberry Holiday Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jello in boiling water in a medium bowl. Stir until dissolved.
2. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice. Set the fruit aside.
3. Stir the reserved pineapple juice, lemon juice, and lemon zest into the Jello mixture.
4. Chill until just set (about one hour).
5. Stir in the cranberry sauce, raspberries, crushed pineapple, and walnuts.
6. Pour the mixture into a 4-1/2 inch ring mold sprayed with vegetable oil or lightly greased.
7. Chill for at least 4 hours or overnight.
8. Unmold and garnish the edges of the salad with lemon slices alternating fresh cranberries.
